items.name_en: New Tag Style✨
items.name_cn:
New Tag Style✨
🎉Soft Lux Oil Wax Leather🎉Small Size🎉🎉This handheld crossbody bag features imported oil wax leather with a glossy sheen that exudes a classical vibe. It comes with a detachable and adjustable long shoulder strap for versatile styling. It offers a very large capacity and is incredibly practical👏. An essential piece for fashionistas, bring this retro-style handbag home now!
Model: 1BA426
Size: 32x15.5x12cm

items.name_en: New Tote Bag🎉2VG119🎉🎉
items.name_cn:
New Tote Bag🎉2VG119🎉🎉
This tote bag features a distinct architectural silhouette defined by geometric lines, cleverly combining aesthetics with functionality. Large capacity design with a woven handle, featuring two large practical side pockets. The practical Re-Nylon body is accented with leather details and a painted enamel triangular metal logo. Lightweight and practical. Guys, grab one now🎉🎉
31.5x42x17cm🎉🎉🎉👏👏👏

items.name_en: New Wax Leather Shoulder Bag🎉 Double Buckle Soft Lux🎉🎉 This leather handbag features a simple and exquisite design, with a glossy finish that exudes a classical atmosphere. It showcases a modern casual attitude, and the long handle is convenient for shoulder carrying. Leather pocket on the back, enamel triangle metal, magnetic snap closure. Large capacity. Extremely useful 👏 Absolutely a must-have for fashionistas, get yours now!

items.name_en: Original Order Original Factory Custom Leather ♥️
items.name_cn:
Original Order Original Factory Custom Leather ♥️
PRAD*a Launches New 2021 Spring/Summer Series Hobo Bag, selected calfskin. Created by Diao Juan, Wenqi, and Dunxi. A new interpretation of the original version. Lightweight and fashionable, a must-have for trendsetters. Prada was founded in Milan, Italy in 1913 by Miuccia Prada. Miuccia Prada's unique talent lies in her unremitting pursuit of new creativity, blending intellectual curiosity and cultural interests to pave the way for pioneers. She not only predicts fashion trends but also leads fashion trends
Size: 27cm Model 123

items.name_en: P 🌹 (Large) 2023 Autumn/Winter New Arrival 🍰 1BD328 is here. This System soft lambskin shoulder bag is embellished with a triangular pattern crafted with exquisite stitching, highlighting the brand's craftsmanship. The flap design features a chain handle that evokes jewelry associations / and is detachable. The front metal-engraved logo is outlined by the iconic triangular stitching, showcasing the brand's style. Can be carried by hand / shoulder / crossbody, highly functional 👍. If you like it, get yours now. Dimensions: 24 x 15 x 7.5cm 🎉🎉!
